title: gentiana lutea var. aurantiaca
intro: Gentiana lutea var. aurantiaca, also known as the yellow gentian, is a variety of the gentian plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent effects, which have been used to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The health benefits of Gentiana lutea var. aurantiaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
